name: @crovia/seal
description: Immutable continuity receipts for evolving AI systems. Offline cryptographic primitive — Ed25519 + canonical JSON, no network required.
author: Crovia Trust <https://croviatrust.com>

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --minify --target=es2022 && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --minify --outfile=dist/browser.js --platform=browser --log-level=warning && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --platform=node --outfile=dist/cli.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --external:@noble/ed25519 --external:@noble/hashes
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test && npm run build
